scripts.test:api:allure: newman run postman/collection/verification-endpoint.postman_collection.json -e postman/environment/iprima-prod.postman_environment.json -r cli,html,allure --reporter-html-export newman/newman-report.html --reporter-allure-resultsDir allure-results && allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.test:api:devices:allure: mkdir -p allure-results/devices allure-report/devices && newman run postman/collection/verification-endpoint.postman_collection.json -e postman/environment/iprima-prod.postman_environment.json -d postman/data/device-types.json -r cli,html,allure --reporter-html-export newman/device-types-report.html --reporter-allure-resultsDir allure-results/devices && allure generate allure-results/devices --clean -o allure-report/devices
